name: Anda Brain
description: Autonomous Graph Memory for OpenClaw agents via Anda Brain, with automatic memory formation and natural-language recall.

spaceId.description: Memory space ID used for formation and recall requests.

spaceToken.description: Space token used as the Bearer token for API authentication.

baseUrl.description: Anda Brain base URL. Supports the hosted service and self-hosted or local deployments for privacy-sensitive environments.

defaultContext.description: Default context included with every formation and recall request.

source.description: Identifier of the source of the current interaction content.

counterparty.description: Preferred. Durable identifier of the current external person or organization interacting with the business agent. Useful for resolving implicit references such as 'the current user', 'they', or omitted subjects.

formationTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for formation requests.

recallTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for recall requests.
